name: Bathroom
hints: A bathroom with a mirror, pocket watch, and toilet. Examine everything carefully.
GET WATCH - it helps you track time (critical in this day/night cycle game). The mirror and toilet may also be useful.
GET WATCH (tracks the day/night cycle). GET MIRROR (vampires have no reflection - useful for detection). LOOK TOILET for hidden items.
GET WATCH (essential for tracking time before nightfall). GET MIRROR (use to detect Dracula - vampires cast no reflection). SOUTH returns to the hall (room 11).
notes: Bathroom containing three useful items: the pocket watch (tracks the day/night cycle which is critical since Dracula becomes active at night), the mirror (vampires cast no reflection - useful for Dracula detection), and a toilet (may contain hidden items). SOUTH leads to the hall (room 11).
